citation_or_title: Peppina Po-Lun Lee. On the semantics of classifier reduplication in Cantonese. Journal of Linguistics 56(4):701-743.
claim_used: Classifier reduplication permits distributive and non-distributive readings; with distributive dou1 the reduplicated classifier regulates the quantification domain through maximizing.
limitations: Full article text was not openly available in this pass; detailed syntactic restrictions were not extracted.

citation_or_title: Yip, Virginia and Stephen Matthews. Intermediate Cantonese: A Grammar and Workbook, 2nd ed., Units 8 and 15.
claim_used: Attests reduplicated classifier, mui5, and so2jau5 ge3 domains with dou1; noun omission; subject and preverbal object paradigms.
limitations: Pedagogical reference; does not establish corpus frequency, all regional variants, or unrestricted productivity.

claim_used: Attests recurring-event and annual interval uses with dou1, a mui5-domain example without overt dou1, and separate rate expressions.
limitations: Dictionary examples are lexical attestations, not controlled experiments or representative frequency samples.

claim_used: Attests context-linked group plus go3go3 dou1: 我啲同事個個都好好人，成日都幫我手.
